entities.name: WATERSHED PROGRAMS
entities.description: Programs in India contributing to water resources development, agricultural production and ecological balance

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: Country where watershed programs are implemented

entities.name: WATER RESOURCES DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: Development of water resources as a goal of watershed programs

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTION
entities.description: Production of crops as a goal of watershed programs

entities.name: ECOLOGICAL BALANCE
entities.description: Maintenance of ecological stability as a goal of watershed programs

entities.name: IMPACT ASSESSMENT
entities.description: Process of evaluating the effects of watershed development projects

entities.name: WATERSHED TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: Technologies used within watershed programs that pose challenges to evaluation

entities.name: CONVENTIONAL METHODS
entities.description: Evaluation methods using financial measures that quantify impacts in an isolated manner

entities.name: FINANCIAL MEASURES
entities.description: Measures used by conventional methods to quantify impacts

entities.name: ECONOMIC SURPLUS APPROACH
entities.description: A holistic approach to evaluate impacts incorporating consumer and producer surplus

entities.name: CONSUMER SURPLUS
entities.description: Benefit consumers receive by purchasing a product for less than they are willing to pay

entities.name: PRODUCER SURPLUS
entities.description: Benefit producers receive by selling at a market price higher than they are willing to sell for

entities.name: FARM HOUSEHOLDS
entities.description: Producers who benefit from watershed interventions

entities.name: SOIL AND MOISTURE CONSERVATION
entities.description: A watershed intervention benefiting farm households

entities.name: WATER TABLE INCREASE
entities.description: A watershed intervention benefiting farm households

entities.name: LIVESTOCK IMPROVEMENT ACTIVITIES
entities.description: A watershed intervention benefiting farm households

entities.name: NON-FARM HOUSEHOLDS
entities.description: Consumers and stakeholders in the region including laborers and business people

entities.name: COIMBATORE DISTRICT
entities.description: District in Tamil Nadu where the ES method was demonstrated

entities.name: TAMIL NADU
entities.description: State in India where Coimbatore district is located

entities.name: DISTRIBUTIONAL EFFECTS
entities.description: Effects of watershed programs captured through the ES method

entities.name: BCR
entities.description: Benefit-Cost Ratio used to measure impact

entities.name: IRR
entities.description: Internal Rate of Return used to measure impact

entities.name: NPV
entities.description: Net Present Value used to measure impact
